# QuitPorn

## What Is QuitPorn

QuitPorn is a shame-free, neuroscience-based porn recovery tool. It is completely anonymous — no email, no tracking, no signup required. Everything is encrypted client-side and stored on your device.

## Key Features

- Streak tracking (never resets without your choice)
- 60-second intervention techniques (box breathing, grounding, cognitive reframing)
- Encrypted journal (AES-256-GCM with PBKDF2 key derivation)
- AI Recovery Coach (5 free messages/day via OpenRouter)
- Trigger pattern detection and prediction
- Content blocking with pre-commit intervention
- Anonymous urge feed (7-day TTL)
- Full backup and export system

## Pricing

Free forever with all core features. Premium features coming soon — estimated pricing:
- Monthly: $3.99/month
- Yearly: $19.99/year (save 58%)
- One-time: $39.99 forever
